name: Scroll Corporation
summary: Scroll Corporation primarily engages in the mail-order and e-commerce businesses in Japan. The company's mail-order business offers fashionable items for working women; casual items for adults; items for everyday activities, such as yoga, walking, and swimming; shoes, bags, and accessories; and undergarments and nightwear for women and their families. Its e-commerce business provides cosmetics; bags, wallets, watches, and accessories; beauty and diet products, and health related goods; interior furniture, sundries, and storage goods; frill and lace sleeping gears, and curtains; and fishing gears, camping equipment, outdoor equipment, disaster stockpiles items, and preserved food. In addition, the company offers skin care products, health and beauty products for woman, health food products, and make-up products; and logistics services. Further, it provides B2B solutions for e-commerce and mail order/online shopping business providers; and domestic travel, as well as travel planning and operations services covering one-day sightseeing bus tours, ski tours, and bus tours for foreign tourists visiting Japan. The company was formerly known as Mutow Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Scroll Corporation in October 2009. Scroll Corporation was founded in 1939 and is headquartered in Hamamatsu, Japan.
